calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2014 Off Calendar

Request To Schedule Prove-Up Hearing For Default Department
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Self-represented Plaintiff MEHMOOD SHEIKH sworn and examined on his own behalf.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) LYNN SMITHERS-HUBBARD.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
On order of the court the following exhibits were marked for Identification as follows:
Exhibit 1. List of items purchased by plaintiff at Amazon.com/Evid.
Exhibit 2. Color picture of bed frame/Evid.
Exhibit 3. Color picture of plaintiff's body/Evid.
Exhibit 4. Color picture of plaintiff's body/Evid.
Exhibit 5. Color picture of plaintiff's body/Evid.
Exhibit 6. Color picture of plaintiff's body/Evid.
Exhibit 7. Color picture of plaintiff's body/Evid.
Exhibit 8. Color picture of plaintiff's body/Evid.
Exhibit 9. Color picture of plaintiff's body/Evid.
Exhibit 10. Color picture of plaintiff's body/Evid.
Exhibit 11. Color picture of plaintiff's body/Evid.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $1,977.96
Pre-Judgment Interest: $73.44
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $46.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $2,097.40

Court ordered Exhibits returned to Plaintiff for the care and custody of the court.

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2014 Continued To Dec-10-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Request To Schedule Prove-Up Hearing For Default Department
Off Calendar Oct-30-2014 Continued To Nov-10-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Self-represented Plaintiff MEHMOOD SHEIKH sworn and examined on his own behalf.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) LYNN SMITHERS-HUBBARD.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Roman Alexander Guelfi-Giggs and Terrence Keyin Louie sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
Court ordered matter continued to November 10, 2014 at 10:30 AM, for further hearing.
